channel.title: Kareem's Digital Cloud
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Kareem's Digital Cloud

item.title: Kareem Abdol-Hamid
item.description: Welcome to my digital cloud → ideas, tech, and me. Currently: Sr.

item.title: Digital Cloud
item.description: Welcome to my Digital Cloud — a living collection of ideas, notes, and connected thoughts.

item.title: Molecular Zettelkasten
item.description: This is Wanderlootes expansion of zettlekasten for a digital note taking system like obsidian.

item.title: Zettelkasten Note Taking
item.description: Zettelkasten comes from a writer who wanted to allow for emergent and disconnected ideas to easily come from content consumed.

item.title: A Brief History & Ethos of the Digital Garden
item.description: Summary Digital gardening is a philosophy and web publishing style that treats personal websites as living, evolving collections of ideas, rather than fixed, chronological blogs.

item.title: Introduction to the Zettelkasten Method
item.description: Zettelkasten is a personal, hypertext-style method for thinking and writing built from small, atomic notes (“Zettel”) that each have a unique ID, a short body in your own words, and references.

item.title: PARA Method
item.description: Summary The PARA system—created by Tiago Forte—organizes all digital information into four categories: Projects, Areas, Resources, and Archives.

item.title: What is Zettelkasten Note-Taking? 📝 Why It Works & Knowledge Theory 🧠
item.description: Summary Using zettelkasten with obsidian and Wanderloots twist on it with the molecular language .

item.title: Developing a Note Taking Systems
item.description: Transclude of cloud Insight or Idea Background Note-taking and writing have many frameworks and some are going to work better for other people.

item.title: Emergent Note Taking
item.description: Transclude of cloud Insight or Idea In order for notes to develop novel ideas you need to be intentional about what you’ve learned from something and how it my connect to other ideas.
